---
title: "Bernard Kwabena Appiah"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: image//IMG_2571.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/bkappiah007
---

*Graduate Student in Statistics*

University of Minnesota Duluth

## Education

Master of Science in Statistics \| 2025--2027

Bachelor of Science in Mathematics & Statistics \| 2019--2023
